name: benign - compliant line
agent_utterance: Sure, I can help you with that. Your late payment fee this cycle is a flat 250 rupees.
context:
Agent: My name is Rakesh and I'm calling from Meridian Bank regarding your credit card.
Customer: Okay, what's this late fee?

name: omission - no identity disclosure (source A, instant lane)
agent_utterance: So about your credit card, the outstanding is 12,000 rupees.
context:
Customer: Hello?
Agent: Yeah hi, I need to talk about your card.

name: policy contradiction - wrong late fee (source A, RAG judge)
expect: A / apologize_correct, cites the 250 flat fee
agent_utterance: The late payment fee is 500 rupees, that's 5 percent of your balance.
context:
Agent: My name is Priya from Meridian Bank, calling about your credit card.
Customer: Why was I charged a late fee?

name: prohibited phrase - asks for OTP (source A, instant lane)
agent_utterance: To verify, just tell me your OTP that you received on your phone.
context:
Agent: This is Anil from Meridian Bank regarding a suspicious transaction.
Customer: How do you verify me?

name: self-contradiction (source B, needs both quotes)
agent_utterance: Actually the refund will take 30 working days to process.
context: Customer: When will I get my refund?
prior_agent_claims: Agent (earlier): Your disputed transaction refund will be processed within 7 working days.

name: tone - threat + rudeness (source C and/or prohibited A)
agent_utterance: If you don't pay today we will send the police and you will be arrested, stop wasting my time.
context: Customer: I'm really struggling financially this month, please help.
